message:
chore: sync concurrent agent changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # To install from AUR: yay -S br-bin
 
 pkgname=br-bin
-pkgver=0.1.7
+pkgver=0.1.11
 pkgrel=1
 pkgdesc="Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
 arch=('x86_64' 'aarch64')

@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ class Br < Formula
   desc "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
   homepage "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust"
   license "MIT"
-  version "0.1.7"
+  version "0.1.11"
 
   on_macos do
     on_arm do

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ Arguments:
   [TITLE]  Issue title
 
 Options:
-      --ID-REDACTED <TITLE_FLAG>      Issue title (alternative flag)
+      --title <TITLE_FLAG>           Issue title (alternative to positional argument)
   -t, --type <TYPE>                  Issue type (task, bug, feature, etc.)
   -p, --priority <PRIORITY>          Priority (0-4 or P0-P4)
   -d, --description <DESCRIPTION>    Description
@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ Options:
       --defer <DEFER>                Defer until date (RFC3339 or relative)
       --ID-REDACTED <EXTERNAL_REF>  External reference
       --ephemeral                    Mark as ephemeral (not exported to JSONL)
+  -s, --status <STATUS>              Initial status (open, deferred, in_progress, closed)
       --ID-REDACTED                      Preview without creating
       --silent                       Output only issue ID
   -f, --file <FILE>                  Create issues from a markdown file (bulk import)

@@ -4,9 +4,11 @@ expression: normalize_output(&output.stdout)
 ---
 br doctor
 OK jsonl.merge_artifacts
-WARN jsonl.parse: No JSONL file found (.beads/issues.jsonl or .beads/beads.jsonl)
+OK sync_jsonl_path: JSONL path is within sync allowlist
+OK sync_conflict_markers: No merge conflict markers found
+OK jsonl.parse: Parsed 0 records
 OK schema.tables
 OK schema.columns
 OK sqlite.integrity_check
-WARN counts.db_vs_jsonl: JSONL not found; cannot compare counts
-OK sync.metadata: Database and JSONL are in sync
+OK counts.db_vs_jsonl: Both have 0 records
+OK sync.metadata: External changes pending import

@@ -34,6 +34,7 @@ Commands:
   sync         Sync database with JSONL file (export or import)
   doctor       Run ID-REDACTED diagnostics
   info         Show diagnostic metadata about the workspace
+  schema       Emit JSON Schemas for br output types (for agent/tooling integration)
   where        Show the active .beads directory
   version      Show version information
   upgrade      Upgrade br to the latest version

@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@ source: tests/snapshots/cli_output.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stdout)
 ---
 Found 2 issue(s) matching 'login'
-○ ID-REDACTED [● P2] [task] - User login flow improvement
-○ ID-REDACTED [● P2] [task] - Authentication bug in login
+○ ID-REDACTED [● P2]  - User login flow improvement
+○ ID-REDACTED [● P2]  - Authentication bug in login

@@ -2,15 +2,20 @@
 source: tests/snapshots/error_messages.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stderr)
 ---
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Validating sync path path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Path validated for sync I/O path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: Import path validated input_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads allow_external=false
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::storage::sqlite: src/storage/sqlite.rs:LINE: Rebuilt blocked issues cache blocked_count=0
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: ID-REDACTED completed imported_count=0 jsonl_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
 {
   "error": {
     "code": "INVALID_PRIORITY",
-    "context": {
-      "hint": "Priority must be 0-4 (0=critical, 4=backlog).",
-      "priority": 99
-    },
-    "hint": "Use a priority between 0 (critical) and 4 (backlog)",
     "message": "Priority must be 0-4, got: 99",
-    "retryable": true
+    "hint": "Use a priority between 0 (critical) and 4 (backlog)",
+    "retryable": true,
+    "context": {
+      "priority": 99,
+      "hint": "Priority must be 0-4 (0=critical, 4=backlog)."
+    }
   }
 }

@@ -2,14 +2,19 @@
 source: tests/snapshots/error_messages.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stderr)
 ---
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Validating sync path path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Path validated for sync I/O path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: Import path validated input_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads allow_external=false
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::storage::sqlite: src/storage/sqlite.rs:LINE: Rebuilt blocked issues cache blocked_count=0
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: ID-REDACTED completed imported_count=0 jsonl_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
 {
   "error": {
     "code": "ISSUE_NOT_FOUND",
+    "message": "Issue not found: ID-REDACTED",
+    "hint": "Run 'br list' to see available issues.",
+    "retryable": false,
     "context": {
       "searched_id": "ID-REDACTED"
-    },
-    "hint": "Run 'br list' to see available issues.",
-    "message": "Issue not found: ID-REDACTED",
-    "retryable": false
+    }
   }
 }

@@ -6,4 +6,14 @@ Updated ID-REDACTED: Will close
   status: closed → in_progress
 YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::storage::sqlite: src/storage/sqlite.rs:LINE: Rebuilt blocked issues cache blocked_count=0
 YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: ID-REDACTED: exporting dirty issues dirty_count=1
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Validating sync path path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Path validated for sync I/O path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: Export path validated output_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads allow_external=false
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: Temp file path validated temp_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl.tmp target_path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Validating sync path path=./.beads/issues.jsonl.tmp beads_dir=./.beads
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Path validated for sync I/O path=./.beads/issues.jsonl.tmp
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Sync path approved for destructive operation path=./.beads/issues.jsonl.tmp operation="rename temp file"
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Validating sync path path=./.beads/issues.jsonl beads_dir=./.beads
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Path validated for sync I/O path=./.beads/issues.jsonl
+YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS DEBUG beads_rust::sync::path: src/sync/path.rs:LINE: Sync path approved for destructive operation path=./.beads/issues.jsonl operation="overwrite JSONL output"
 YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS  INFO beads_rust::sync: src/sync/mod.rs:LINE: ID-REDACTED complete exported=1

@@ -4,10 +4,10 @@ expression: normalize_json(&json)
 ---
 [
   {
-    "close_reason": "Done",
-    "closed_at": "TIMESTAMP",
     "id": "ISSUE_ID",
+    "title": "Issue to close",
     "status": "closed",
-    "title": "Issue to close"

+    "close_reason": "Done"
   }
 ]

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+source: tests/snapshots/json_output.rs
+expression: normalize_json(&add_json)
+---
+{
+  "id": "ISSUE_ID",
+  "issue_id": "ISSUE_ID",
+  "author": "ACTOR",
+  "text": "First comment",
+  "created_at": "TIMESTAMP"
+}

+    "author": "ACTOR",
+    "text": "First comment",
+    "created_at": "TIMESTAMP"
+  }
+]
